title: hypericum barbatum subsp. macedonicum
intro: Hypericum barbatum subsp. macedonicum, also known as Macedonian St. John's Wort, is a plant species in the St. John's Wort genus, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. It is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
